plan_description: Reads a specific Google Sheets tab, filters leads where Stage = 4, renders an HTML summary table with selected columns, and emails it to a deduplicated recipient list (or sends a 'none found' email when there are no matches).

data: - Read lead rows from the Google Sheets spreadsheet with ID "1RHLbBXzrKv24gNgp7a4Lr7RlMIrP9fjacfGWjhPAbOE".
- Read lead rows from the tab named "Leads Tab".
- Treat the first row as the header row.
- Locate columns by these exact header names: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Sales Person.
- Use the full set of populated rows beneath the header row as the candidate lead records.
actions: - Filter the candidate lead records to only include rows where the "Stage" column value equals "4".
- Exclude any row where the "Stage" cell is blank or missing.
- Build a summary table where each remaining row becomes one table row.
- Output the summary table columns in this exact order: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Sales Person.
- Deduplicate the recipient list so each email address is included only once.
output: - Generate an HTML table embedded directly in the email body.
- The HTML table must include a header row with: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Sales Person.
- If zero rows match Stage = 4, generate an email body that clearly states that no high-qualified (Stage = 4) leads were found and do not include a data table.
delivery: - Send the email to: meiribarak@gmail.com, eomer3@gmail.com, offir.omer@gmail.com.
- Use a subject line that includes: "High-qualified leads (Stage = 4)".
- Send exactly one email that includes all matching leads in a single table.
processing_steps: - Load the leads data from the specified spreadsheet ID and tab name.
- Identify the required columns by header name.
- Render the filtered rows into an HTML table (or a 'none found' message).
- Send the email to the deduplicated recipient list.

resolved_user_inputs.value: Date | Lead Name | Company | Email | Phone | Stage | Notes | Sales Person
Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Sales Person
